matrix.measurement: DOM and visual order for title, price, availability and primary action
matrix.pass_condition: Reading order is identical and price precedes action
matrix.fail_condition: Visual reorder changes meaning or action precedes price

matrix.measurement: Calculated contrast, targets, labels and error semantics
matrix.pass_condition: All declared WCAG 2.2 AA thresholds pass

matrix.measurement: Mode resolution at every adjacent boundary
matrix.pass_condition: Exactly one mode applies at every width

matrix.measurement: Complete catalog-detail-variant-cart-state path without pointer
matrix.pass_condition: Every task is operable by keyboard

matrix.measurement: Focus indicator, order and restoration
matrix.pass_condition: Focus is visible and restored after overlays
matrix.fail_condition: Focus is hidden, lost or trapped

matrix.measurement: Accessible names, roles, values, availability and announcements
matrix.pass_condition: Critical information is exposed without visual dependency
matrix.fail_condition: Any critical state lacks semantic representation

matrix.measurement: Nine canonical states on primary and secondary components
matrix.pass_condition: Every state is distinct visually and semantically

matrix.measurement: Selection retained after synthetic cart failure
matrix.pass_condition: Error explains recovery and retains valid selection
matrix.fail_condition: Selection is destroyed or false success shown

matrix.measurement: Page scrollWidth versus clientWidth
matrix.pass_condition: scrollWidth is not greater than clientWidth

matrix.measurement: Seven-level scale, body size, reflow and fallback
matrix.pass_condition: Fraunces, Manrope and mono roles preserve hierarchy and body is at least 16 px
matrix.fail_condition: Hierarchy collapses, body shrinks or fallback breaks layout

matrix.measurement: Mathematical contrast for every semantic pair
matrix.pass_condition: Normal text is at least 4.5:1 and UI at least 3:1
matrix.fail_condition: Any pair is below its threshold

matrix.measurement: Grid allocation and DOM order across modes
matrix.pass_condition: Asymmetry exists only where space permits and compact mode is single-column
matrix.fail_condition: Composition changes reading order or clips actions

matrix.measurement: Reserved ratios, alternative text and crop safety
matrix.pass_condition: Four synthetic view types reserve space and remain understandable
matrix.fail_condition: Layout shifts, text is baked in or product meaning is lost

matrix.measurement: Control targets, spec rows and action visibility
matrix.pass_condition: Targets are at least 44 px and density never hides an action
matrix.fail_condition: Target is smaller or technical labels lose association

matrix.measurement: Headline length, factual specificity and recovery language
matrix.pass_condition: Voice is concise, factual and actionable
matrix.fail_condition: Unverified claim, artificial urgency or ambiguous error appears

matrix.measurement: Full stress fixture at 320 px
matrix.pass_condition: Single-column flow, no page overflow and all actions reachable

matrix.measurement: Compact upper boundary
matrix.pass_condition: Compact contract remains stable

matrix.measurement: Standard lower boundary
matrix.pass_condition: Exactly standard mode applies

matrix.measurement: Standard upper boundary
matrix.pass_condition: Eight-column layout remains stable

matrix.measurement: Expanded lower boundary
matrix.pass_condition: Twelve-column editorial composition activates without reordering

matrix.measurement: Expanded upper boundary
matrix.pass_condition: Expanded composition remains within container
matrix.fail_condition: Wide margins activate early or content overflows

matrix.measurement: Wide lower boundary
matrix.pass_condition: Wide spacing activates with unchanged semantic order

matrix.measurement: Wide stress width
matrix.pass_condition: Container caps line length and gallery scale
